title: Tree thorp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tree thorps''' were primitive arboreal [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] cities on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. The Dugs could move freely through the trees.

{{City-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
